record.field: Inbound Export EN — Distributor / Retail Chain
CasaFolino — your inquiry from {{ object.country_id.name or 'abroad' }}

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #333;
div.p: Thank you for reaching out, and for the recognition that {{ object.partner_name }}'s interest represents for us — receiving a message from a partner of your standing is something we take seriously.

Please find attached our product catalogue covering our full range: spreadable creams, flavoured honeys and honey mousses, crispy chilli, ready-to-cook risottos, spice blends, gluten-free cantucci, and chocolate. Everything is produced in-house in Calabria, Southern Italy. We hold BRC, IFS, Kosher, Halal, EU Organic and REX certifications, and we currently export to 20+ countries.
To prepare a tailored proposal — pricing, MOQs, lead times, palletisation — it would help to know a bit more about your project:

ol.li: Which product lines and formats are you most interested in?
Are you looking for a co-branded / private label setup, or CasaFolino-branded products on the shelf?
Are there specific certification or label-language requirements for your market?
Indicative volumes and timing for a first order

div.p: If easier, we can set up a short video call. I'd be happy to introduce you to Antonio Folino, our CEO, and walk you through the company in more detail.
Looking forward to hearing from you,

Best regards,
Josefina Lazzaro
Export Manager
CasaFolino S.r.l. Società Benefit
josefina.lazzaro@casafolino.com
